candidates.faers_interpretation: 10 FAERS reports mention both Progesterone and Idiopathic pulmonary fibrosis-related terms. Limited but notable real-world signal.
candidates.signature_interpretation: Progesterone was not found among the top 31 drugs that reverse the Idiopathic pulmonary fibrosis gene signature. Top reversers: NCGC00183216-01 (1.596), MENADIONE (1.565), LASALOCID SODIUM (1.541)
candidates.ai_hypothesis: it has been shown to reduce the number of myofibroblasts and to reduce the expression of collagen I and III.
confidence_reasons: Moderate FAERS signal: 10 adverse event reports mention drug-disease co-occurrence
